summary: Complete M5 with a real axis-aligned section plane and bounded per-project named camera bookmarks.

decisions.decision: Apply the axis-aligned section plane as Three.js local clipping on the currently presented mesh, with its offset bounded by the rendered mesh bounds and no mutation of source or export geometry.
decisions.rationale: FR-15.8 requires a visual interior inspection tool. Keeping it inside the presentation boundary makes the cut real in the viewer while preserving the full-render export authority required by FR-4.3.

decisions.decision: Serialize validated complete camera states through a project-keyed platform persistence port, capped at 64 bookmarks and 64 KiB, without writing bookmark metadata into user project files.
decisions.rationale: Bookmarks are per-project UI state. A typed profile-storage port keeps desktop and browser composition symmetric, prevents path leakage into keys, and avoids silently modifying OpenSCAD projects.

testEvidence.criterion: FR-15.8 requires an axis-aligned, toggleable plane draggable along its normal and named camera bookmark save/recall/delete behavior.
testEvidence.test: Exercise the section controls, exact Three.js material plane, bookmark serializer, platform namespace, bookmark UI, and connector persistence path.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/viewer/ViewerToolbar.test.tsx tests/ui/viewer/model-viewer-runtime-clipping.test.ts tests/platform-web/browser-camera-bookmark-persistence.test.ts tests/ui/viewer/CameraBookmarks.test.tsx
red.outcome: RED: clipping controls and material behavior were absent, and the bookmark UI and persistence adapter did not exist. Four suites failed as intended.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/viewer/viewer-state.test.ts tests/application/viewer/camera-bookmarks.test.ts tests/ui/viewer/ViewerToolbar.test.tsx tests/ui/viewer/model-viewer-runtime-clipping.test.ts tests/platform-web/browser-camera-bookmark-persistence.test.ts tests/ui/viewer/CameraBookmarks.test.tsx

testEvidence.criterion: The completed viewer feature must preserve existing viewer, presentation, thumbnail, web-platform, and desktop-platform behavior.
testEvidence.test: Run all application viewer and UI viewer suites plus both platform compositions after the line-budget refactor.

red.outcome: RED: the integrated behavior compiled, but the additions crossed the enforced 400-line UI-file policy in three existing files.

green.command: pnpm.cmd run typecheck; pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/viewer tests/ui/viewer tests/platform-web/browser-camera-bookmark-persistence.test.ts tests/platform-web/web-platform.test.ts tests/platform-desktop/desktop-platform.test.ts
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript passed; 23 files and 133 tests passed. A separate lint run passed with all UI files within 400 lines and platform boundaries intact.

testEvidence.criterion: The M5 candidate must pass the repository-wide automated and real-browser gates without a blind aggregate rerun.
testEvidence.test: Run the full unit suite once, repair only its two concrete residual failures, continue the remaining generated/policy/provenance/license/notices/public/build/site gates, and run Playwright once.

red.outcome: RED: 1,632 of 1,634 tests passed. The two failures were a stale pre-FR-15.6 F12 expectation and two non-contract CSS variables introduced by the M5 Search stylesheet.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/Workbench.editor-settings.test.tsx tests/application/theme/theme-css-variable-usage.test.ts; pnpm.cmd run check:generated; pnpm.cmd run lint; pnpm.cmd run check:provenance; pnpm.cmd run check:licenses all; pnpm.cmd run check:notices; pnpm.cmd run check:public-surfaces; pnpm.cmd run build; npm.cmd test --prefix website; pnpm.cmd run test:e2e
green.outcome: GREEN: both affected suites passed (8 tests); generated source, source policy, provenance, 120 npm plus 507 Rust licenses, notices, public surfaces, production build, and all 3 rendered website routes passed; Playwright passed 24 of 24 tests. The already-green 1,632 unit tests were not rerun.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
